flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Muskingum University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.0k → $19.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Muskingum University fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (63.2% → 54.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Muskingum University fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (45.1% → 40.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Muskingum University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (52.7% vs 62.4%).
